use_cases: Displaying mobile app UI designs in a realistic iPhone device frame for presentations
Showcasing responsive web designs across different iPhone models and orientations
Creating marketing materials with product app mockups
Previewing UI components and screens within an authentic device context
Generating social media visuals featuring app content in device frames
ai_summary: A highly configurable iPhone device mockup component that renders realistic device frames with support for multiple iPhone models (X, 14, 15 series), orientations, colors, and features like dynamic island and notch. The component provides fine-grained control over bezels, corner radius, safe areas, shadows, and wallpaper customization. Ideal for showcasing mobile app interfaces, product demos, and responsive designs in an authentic device context for SaaS platforms, e-commerce sites, and developer documentation.
